object_under_evaluation: same-task bounded workflow regression against a frozen baseline
claim_boundary: On this frozen same-task surface, the candidate can be compared against one named baseline target without treating style-only change as capability movement or turning the result into general growth.
limitations: This report does not prove general capability growth or decline.
This report does not replace one-run workflow diagnosis.
This report does not explain every root cause behind a regression signal.

per_case_comparisons.baseline_note: The baseline stayed scoped and reported verification limits clearly.
per_case_comparisons.candidate_note: The candidate matched the same bounded workflow surface with no visible loss.
per_case_comparisons.comparison_note: The frozen baseline strength was preserved closely enough that the same-task read stayed bounded and stable.

per_case_comparisons.baseline_note: The baseline left a reviewable verification trail and one explicit verification boundary.
per_case_comparisons.candidate_note: The candidate produced a cleaner-looking summary but skipped the visible check that made the baseline reviewable.
per_case_comparisons.comparison_note: The candidate lost a reviewable workflow strength that the frozen baseline had on the same case.

per_case_comparisons.baseline_note: The baseline outcome was modest, but the path was bounded and explicit.
per_case_comparisons.candidate_note: The candidate changed phrasing and report structure while keeping the same bounded workflow evidence.
per_case_comparisons.comparison_note: The visible difference stayed style-shaped and too weak to justify a stronger regression or improvement claim.

per_case_comparisons.baseline_note: The baseline handled the task cleanly but left one uncertainty implicit.
per_case_comparisons.candidate_note: The candidate kept the same bounded workflow surface and made the uncertainty explicit without widening scope.
per_case_comparisons.comparison_note: The candidate is reviewably stronger on this case, but one bounded improvement does not erase the regression elsewhere.
